articles.title: Hillary Clinton tells House panel she 'had no idea' of Epstein's crimes
articles.summary: The ex-secretary of state called for President Trump to be questioned under oath about his past association with the sex offender.

articles.title: EU states told to use existing fund for safe abortions after citizens' petition
